english_text: Let us go see the cherry blossoms
It is the perfect weather for a walk
Azaleas are blooming on the mountains
I am cleaning the house for spring
I want to go on a picnic
Let us have a picnic in the park
I planted flowers in the garden
Spring onions taste the best now
Light layers are perfect for spring
The park is full of people
I love the colors of spring
Spring field trips are the best
I went to a flower festival
I opened the windows to let fresh air in
The fog lifts in the morning
I wear a mask because of fine dust
I want to capture spring in photos
Spring reminds me of new beginnings
